architecture.system_name: ADC Acquisition + Moving Average Filter (FreeRTOS + LPC2148)

tasks.name: vAcquisitionTask
tasks.rationale: Priority 3 (highest): 50Hz sampling (20ms period). RMS assigns highest priority to shortest period.

tasks.name: vProcessingTask
tasks.rationale: Priority 2: event-driven, wakes on queue data. Stack 512 for 16-sample buffer and arithmetic.

tasks.name: vOutputTask
tasks.rationale: Priority 1 (lowest): UART transmission can lag without affecting filter accuracy.

queues.name: xADCQueue
queues.rationale: Depth 32: holds ~640ms of 50Hz samples. Memory: ~80 + 32*2 = ~144 bytes of RAM.

safety: AD0CR PDN (bit 21) must be set before starting conversion.
Read AD0DR1 only after DONE bit (bit 31) is confirmed set.
PINSEL1 must configure P0.28 as AD0.1 before AD0CR is written.
Analog input voltage must not exceed VREF (3.3V on LPC2148).
